purpose: Catalogued locations and masked references for every API key on the system. NEVER embeds plaintext secrets. Append-only.

golden_rules.rule_1_nothing_obsolete: Backup .env files remain. No file deleted, ever.
golden_rules.rule_5_backups_critical: Originals + .bak + .backup files stay where they are.
golden_rules.rule_7_enhancement_not_reduction: This registry only ADDS locations; it never erases.
golden_rules.rule_8_personal_files_sacred: Documents, Downloads, Pictures, Videos, Music, Desktop, OneDrive listings below are LOCATION pointers only. They are never read, opened, or modified.

registered_keys.tool: OpenRouter (OpenAI / Claude / Anthropic / Mistral / DeepSeek / etc.)
registered_keys.comment: OpenRouter is the only AI provider (per project CLAUDE.md). Single source of truth for AI models.

registered_keys.location_hint: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var (resolved at runtime; check .env files for presence)
registered_keys.comment: Per project CLAUDE.md: do NOT set direct provider keys. Use OpenRouter only.

registered_keys.location_hint: Multiple `.env.openrouter.backup*` files in $HOME and $HOME/.qwen (catalogue-only, not opened)
registered_keys.comment: All backups PRESERVED (Rule #5). OPT-7.1 will add an encrypted-vault WRAPPER for read-only use; originals untouched.
Plain-text session tokens live in Claude's config. OPT-7.1 plan: move to Windows Credential Manager via wrapper, leaving the originals untouched.
Rule #5: existing .qwen backups preserved. OPT-7.1 may add an audit trail.
OPT-7.1 plan: read-then-route via Windows Credential Manager; the JSON file remains untouched.
OPT-7.1 plan: add a read wrapper; original file remains.
OPT-7.1 plan: read wrapper only; original untouched.
Multiple model keys may be present (Anthropic, OpenAI, etc.) — all remain in the original file.

personal_folder_reminder.rule: Rule #8 — never read, never modify. This registry lists tool dot-folders only.

next_actions_additive_only: Build $HOME/WRAPPER_KEY_VAULT.ps1 — reads through existing dot-folder files; never modifies them.
Build $HOME/API_USAGE_AUDIT.log — append-only usage log per key.
Do not delete any registered backup. Rule #5 stands.
compliance_footer: ADDITIVE ONLY. No file in any dot-folder, or any backup, has been modified.
